author: doll-agent
content: Implemented SeedSequence in ferray-random::bitgen::seed_sequence. Methods: new(entropy), with_spawn_key, generate_state(n_words) -> Vec<u32>, generate_u64(), seed::<B: BitGenerator>() to seed any BitGenerator, and spawn(n) -> Vec<SeedSequence> for child generation with disjoint spawn-key paths. Re-exported as ferray_random::SeedSequence. 5 unit tests cover determinism, entropy-divergence, child independence, spawn-counter advancement, and BitGenerator round-trip.
